finalized_plan.description: Derive the derivative of f(x) = x³ + 4x² – 3x + 8, which is f ′(x) = 3x² + 8x – 3
Set up the Newton’s Method iteration formula: xₙ₊₁ = xₙ – f(xₙ)/f ′(xₙ)
Start with the initial guess x₀ = –5
Iteratively compute each xₙ using the Newton’s Method formula
At each iteration, round the computed xₙ to four decimal places
Compare the rounded value of the new iteration with the rounded value of the previous iteration
Continue iterating until the rounded value converges (i.e., successive rounded values are identical)
The smallest n at which the convergence is observed (after performing xₙ₊₁ update) is the answer
Verify the computations and rounding steps to ensure the correct iteration count

root_cause_reasoning: The reasoning logic was correct, but an error occurred when stating the final answer. Agent directly took the number of calculations as the answer; based on the problem's definition, n should equal 2.
